name: demoblaze-api-tests
description: Automatización de Pruebas de API REST para Demoblaze con Cypress

scripts.clean:reports: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('reports')) fs.rmSync('reports', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.report: npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate

author: QA Automation Engineer
